message.content:
@startuml
title CATEGORY's Class Diagram

package "jp" as jp
    package "ac" as ac
        package "shibaura" as shibaura
            package "it" as it
                package "ie" as ie
                    package "domain" as domain
                        package "model" as model
                            package "category" as category
                                interface CategoryRepository
                                    <<Repository>>
                                    findAll()
                                    save()
                                end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

package "gateway" as gateway
    package "category" as category
        interface CategoryRepository
            <<Repository>>
            findAll()
            save()
        end
end

categoryRepository : CategoryRepository
MySQLCategoryRepository : CategoryRepository

categoryRepository ..> MySQLCategoryRepository

@enduml
